Est. 2024 · Madrid

Your gateway to the night sky

From telescope nights to astrophotography workshops — a community of stargazers who believe the universe is better shared.

Explore the club

What we offer

No experience required. Just bring curiosity.

🔭

Observation Nights

Monthly gatherings under dark skies with our shared Dobsonian and Schmidt-Cassegrain telescopes.

📸

Astrophotography

Learn stacking, guiding, and post-processing. From smartphone snaps to cooled CMOS rigs.

🧑‍🏫

Talks & Workshops

Guest speakers, cosmology primers, and hands-on sessions about reading star charts.

🌍

Dark Sky Trips

Quarterly excursions to certified Starlight Reserves in the Spanish countryside.

Upcoming events

All events are free and open to the public.

JUN 22 Summer Solstice Stargazing Sierra de Guadarrama · 21:30
JUL 06 Planetary Imaging 101 Clubhouse · 18:00
JUL 20 Lunar Eclipse Watch Party Retiro Park · 22:00
AUG 10 Perseid Meteor Shower Campout Gredos Mountains · 20:00

What members say

“I walked in knowing nothing about astronomy. Now I can align an equatorial mount blindfolded. The patience and passion of this group is unreal.”

— Clara M., member since 2024

Get the Sky Bulletin

Once a month — upcoming events, sky maps, and astrophotography tips. No spam, ever.
